ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the district */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Total agricultural area in the district */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_data" (
  "yield_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the data collection */,
  "change_mean_yield" REAL /* Change in mean yield */,
  "change_mean_area" REAL /* Change in mean area */,
  "interaction_effect" REAL /* Interaction effect */,
  "change_area_covariance" REAL /* Change in yield covariance */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural practice */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural practice */,
  "practice_description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural practice */,
  "practice_type" TEXT /* Type of agricultural practice */,
  "practice_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the practice */,
  "practice_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the practice */,
  "practice_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the practice */,
  "practice_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_practices_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental condition */,
  "condition_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the condition */,
  "condition_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the condition */,
  "condition_value" REAL /* Value of the condition */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "yield_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the yield data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of data access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_yield_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_data_id") REFERENCES yield_data ("yield_data_id")
)

Timestamp of when the data was last updated

Unique identifier for each environmental condition
